headline: U.S. Bank signs on as NFL's bank and wealth management partner
summary: The Minneapolis-based company plans to leverage the arrangement to draw more attention to its growing list of national business lines, transcending its regional reputation.

headline: Evercore ISI Lowers USB Target; HSBC Flags Repricing Across Bank Stocks
summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) is included among the 15 Best Consistent Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 6, Evercore ISI lowered its price recommendation on U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) to $58 from $65. It reiterated an In Line rating on the shares. The change came as part of the firm’s Q1 preview for banks and […]

headline: NFL and U.S. Bank Announce Partnership Centered on Banking and Wealth Management
summary: NEW YORK & MINNEAPOLIS, April 07, 2026--The National Football League and U.S. Bank announced today a multi-year partnership, naming U.S. Bank as a new official bank and wealth management sponsor of the NFL. The collaboration builds on a strong, trusted relationship between the two organizations spanning more than 20 years and represents a shared commitment to innovation and financial stability.

headline: 8 'Rock Solid' Stocks Hold Strong During Iran War Chaos
summary: Investors normally go all-in for stocks that outperform the S&P 500. But amid inflation and war chaos, sometimes stability is desirable.
